name: codex-cloud-bootstrap
description: Set up repo-local Codex Cloud bootstrap files for private plugin and skill workflows

interface.shortDescription: Prepare repos so Codex Cloud can load plugin workflows
interface.longDescription: Codex Cloud Bootstrap helps set up cloud-safe repo guidance, setup-script snippets, and optional hooks for making private plugin and skill workflows available inside Codex Cloud tasks.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repo for Codex Cloud plugin bootstrap.
Audit this repo's Codex Cloud bootstrap.
